title: AutoSprint
description: This mod automatically starts sprinting when you press W, and you don't need to press the left Ctrl!
body:
Requirements:
- Version: 1.21.1
- Platform: Fabric
- Loader support:  0.15.11, 0.16.0, 0.16.1, 0.16.2, 0.16.3, 0.16.4, 0.16.5, 0.16.6, 0.16.7, 0.16.8, 0.16.9, 0.16.10. 0.16.11, 0.16.12, 0.16.13, 0.16.14, 0.17.0, 0.17.1, 0.17.2, 0.17.3, 0.18.0, 0.18,1, 0.18.2, 0.18.3, 0.18.4

Description:
AutoSprint is a mod that allows you to automatically sprint when you press the W key. With this mod, you don't have to worry about constantly holding down the sprint key. 
How it works:
- Once the mod is activated, when you press W, you will automatically start sprinting.
- If sprinting is disabled, you will need to crash into a block to reset sprinting.
- When you press W again (when sprint is off) you will start sprinting again as soon as the mod is on.
Settings:
- You can change the binds for turning the mod on/off through the control menu:
  - Esc > Controls > Key Settings.
